1.Supporting the management of the Home Gateway's IP address.
2.Dynamic Address management, including Dynamic Address distribution, and parameters distributed to equipment, such as lease time, address range, DNS, etc.
Logout
  • NOTE: The DHCP Start IP Address and DHCP End IP address should be in the same subnet as the LAN IP.
  • 2. When LAN IP's Network Number changes, please make sure those special pool IP Addresses are in the same subnet as the LAN IP.
